name: wasi-webrtc-datachannels-node-host
description: Browser-first (Node) host for the wasi:webrtc-data-channels spike, using jco + @roamhq/wrtc.

scripts.build:component: cd ../../components/echo-demo && cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && mkdir -p build && wasm-tools component new target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/echo_demo.wasm -o build/echo-demo.component.wasm
